common.tagline: Cloud-hybrid SaaS for Turkish structural engineering

auth.signupSubtitle: Try free for 14 days — no card required
auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to your YapıOps account
auth.kvkkConsent: I have read and accept the KVKK privacy notice
auth.resetPasswordEmailSent: We've sent a reset link to your email.
auth.verifyEmailBody: We've sent a verification link to {email}. Please check your inbox.

bridge.title: Connect Desktop Bridge
bridge.subtitle: Pairing the ETABS bridge with your cloud account.
bridge.explainer: Click Connect — the Bridge will pick up your session automatically. You can close the window after.
bridge.securityNote: Tokens are passed via URL fragment (browser-only, never sent to the server). The Bridge validates the state parameter.

errors.noSession: No active session. Please sign in again.

dashboard.trialBanner: {daysLeft} days left in your free trial. Click to choose a plan.
dashboard.noProjects: No projects yet. Get started by creating your first project.

empty.title: No projects yet
empty.description: Pick a module from the sidebar to create your first project. Only Billing is active in Phase 0.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Project records that every Ek-3, RaporX and Spektrum analysis attaches to.
projects.newSubtitle: Create the project shell; technical fields fill in via the Ek-3 wizard.
projects.empty: No projects yet. Use the top right to create your first.
projects.archiveConfirm: Archive this project? Linked Ek-3 records are kept.
projects.detailsHint: Building class, DTS, BYS, and other technical fields are filled via the Ek-3 wizard.

notifications.title: Notification Preferences
notifications.subtitle: Toggle email notifications. Transactional emails are on by default under KVKK.

ek3Generated.label: Email me when an Ek-3 PDF is generated
ek3Generated.description: When you click "Generate PDF" in the wizard, we email you a link to the ready PDF.

weeklyDigest.label: Send a weekly digest
weeklyDigest.description: Monday mornings: summary of last week's Ek-3 and report generations.

errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission for this action
errors.userAlreadyExists: An account with this email already exists. Try signing in instead.

ek3pilot.title: Ek-3 Pilot
ek3pilot.subtitle: Generate the Yapı Denetim Ek-3 form in 5 minutes

list.empty: No Ek-3 forms yet. Click to create your first one.

preview.title: PDF Preview
preview.signNote: PDF includes an e-signature field — open with E-İmzaTR to sign.

errors.quotaExceeded: Monthly Ek-3 limit reached ({used}/{limit}). Upgrade your plan from billing.
errors.planExcludes: This feature isn't included in your plan.
errors.incompleteForm: Form is incomplete. Please fill all required fields.
errors.immutableStatus: Signed or superseded Ek-3 forms cannot be edited.
errors.alreadySuperseded: This Ek-3 is already superseded. Continue from the latest version.
errors.etabsImportComingSoon: ETABS import is coming in week 8–9.

firmaSablon.title: Firm Templates
firmaSablon.subtitle: Save contractor and inspector firms once, pick them quickly in forms.

templates.title: Ek-3 Form Templates
templates.subtitle: The official Ek-3 PDF template is auto-tracked from ministry sources; manual uploads are also supported.
templates.activeDescription: This version is used at PDF generation time. Auto-sync runs daily at 03:00 UTC.
templates.noActive: No active template. Sync now or upload manually — otherwise the renderer falls back to HTML.
templates.uploadDescription: Use this when the official PDF has changed and the cron hasn't picked it up yet.

syncResult.unchanged: Active version is up to date — source hash hasn't changed.

uploadResult.deduped: Same SHA-256 was already recorded; existing record activated.
